title: oxylobium cuneatum var. emarginatum
intro: Oxylobium cuneatum var. emarginatum, also known as Oxylobium emarginatum, is a plant species native to New South Wales in Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and treat wounds. Oxylobium cuneatum var. emarginatum can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, which is a common herbal preparation method for its medicinal properties.
